movie.actors: Elisabeth Shue, Kevin Bacon, Josh Brolin, Kim Dickens
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 7 wins & 11 nominations.
movie.plot: Having discovered they could turn animals invisible, a group of scientists test the subject on a human. Head of research, Dr. Sebastian Caine decides to use himself as the subject. After the experiment can't be reversed, it takes a toll on Caine's personality, causing him to hunt down and kill his colleagues
movie.title: Hollow Man
movie.writer: Gary Scott Thompson (story), Andrew W. Marlowe (story), Andrew W. Marlowe (screenplay)
